top_signals.title: Agents of change − speech by Sarah Breeden
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Op-ed: The paradigm shift in critical mineral investment –Tungsten is just the beginning.
top_signals.summary: Critical minerals strategies must shift from catching up with China to targeting contestable markets where real leverage remains.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Canada Offers Teck C$400 Million for Strategic Metals Growth
top_signals.summary: The Canadian government will contribute as much as C$400 million ($282 million) to Teck Resources Ltd.’s plans to boost output at a key metals refinery, creating a deal that could ensure the country receives a portion of future germanium, antimony and gallium supply.

top_signals.title: Japanese executives accused of bribing Cambodian government worker
top_signals.summary: The company side allegedly gave about $1,000 in cash to an official of Cambodia's Ministry of Commerce in July 2021.
